description:
♡ 𝓣𝖍𝖊 𝓓𝖆𝖗𝖐 𝓡𝖎𝖉𝖊 ♡

𝖉𝗈-𝖘𝗁𝗂𝗄

⋆.˚ ᡣ𐭩 .𖥔˚

Empty streets.

A friendly offer — but the danger is closer than it seems.

A smile that hides more than kindness.

Will you take the ride?

❝ Hey… good night. Need a ride? It’s dangerous to be alone out here. ❞
